category.scope_note: Electric corded and cordless hand-held and transportable power tools exported from China to South Korea under the KC certification regime.

title.en: China-to-South Korea Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入韩国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入韓國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against South Korea KC safety certification, KS C IEC 62841 electrical safety, KC-EMC, RoHS-equivalent substance, and lithium battery pack requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与韩国 KC 安全认证、KS C IEC 62841 电气安全、KC-EMC、RoHS 等效物质及锂电池组要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與韓國 KC 安全認證、KS C IEC 62841 電氣安全、KC-EMC、RoHS 等效物質及鋰電池組要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, certification-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Korean law, KC certification scope, KS standards, RRA radio and EMC obligations, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认证机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行韩国法律、KC 认证范围、KS 标准、RRA 无线电及电磁兼容义务以及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認證機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行韓國法律、KC 認證範圍、KS 標準、RRA 無線電及電磁相容義務以及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering South Korea, the mandatory baseline is KC Safety Certification under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, KS C IEC 62841 electrical safety, KC-EMC registration via RRA, RoHS-equivalent substance control under the Act on Resource Circulation of EEE and Vehicles, and KC 62133 for cordless lithium battery packs. Korea operates no EU-style outdoor-noise product-marking scheme, so the EU noise directive route does not transfer.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入韩国，强制基线是依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》取得 KC 安全认证、KS C IEC 62841 电气安全、经 RRA 完成 KC-EMC 登记、依据《电气电子产品及汽车资源循环法》进行 RoHS 等效物质管控，以及无绳锂电池组的 KC 62133。韩国并无欧盟式户外噪声产品标识制度，欧盟噪声指令路径不适用。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入韓國，強制基線是依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》取得 KC 安全認證、KS C IEC 62841 電氣安全、經 RRA 完成 KC-EMC 登記、依據《電氣電子產品及汽車資源循環法》進行 RoHS 等效物質管控，以及無繩鋰電池組的 KC 62133。韓國並無歐盟式戶外噪聲產品標識制度，歐盟噪聲指令路徑不適用。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, certification body, customs, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
